code:
import io
import string
import list

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not removed and v == x
        removed = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing nums")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing k")?

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let k = string.parse_int(string.trim(line2)).ok_or("bad k")?

  mut take = k
  if take > nums.len()
    take = nums.len()
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = nums
  mut j = 0
  while j < take
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, m)
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut idx = 0
  while idx < result.len()
    match result.get(idx)
    when Some(v)
      if idx == 0
        output = "#{v}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end

  println(output)
  Ok(())
end
